description: Decodes ALU operation signals from alu_op (2-bit) and instruction fields (funct3, funct7) to generate 3-bit alu_control for 32-bit RISC-V ALU. Maps alu_op_00 to ADD, alu_op_01 to SUB, and alu_op_10 to R-type operations (ADD/SUB/AND/OR) based on funct3 and funct7 fields.
dse_strategies: Fully combinational truth-table decoder using case statements on alu_op with nested funct3/funct7 decoding for minimal latency and area
Hierarchical decoder with separate funct3 and funct7 decoders feeding a multiplexer tree, enabling independent optimization and reuse
Encoded lookup table (LUT) with alu_op as primary index and funct3/funct7 concatenation as secondary index, trading logic depth for reduced gate count
